languages.original_text: {n}Argenta raises an eyebrow.{/n} "But surely it does not answer you? How truly peculiar!"

languages.text: {n}Argenta arque un sourcil.{/n} « Mais il ne vous répond pas, si ? C'est vraiment très étonnant ! »

languages.text: {n}阿洁塔挑了挑眉。{/n}“但它肯定不会回应你吧？这也太诡异了！”
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta raises an eyebrow.{/n} "But surely it does not answer you? How truly peculiar!"

languages.text: {n}Argenta arquea una ceja.{/n} «No le responderá, ¿verdad? ¡Es algo muy peculiar!».
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta raises an eyebrow.{/n} "But surely it does not answer you? How truly peculiar!"

languages.text: {n}アルジェンタは眉をひそめる。{/n}「でも、きっと答えてくれないんでしょう？実に奇妙だ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta raises an eyebrow.{/n} "But surely it does not answer you? How truly peculiar!"

traits.locale_text: {n}アルジェンタは眉をひそめる。{/n}「でも、きっと答えてくれないんでしょう？実に奇妙だ。」

languages.text: {n}Argenta tek kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Konuşunca karşılık vermiyor, değil mi? Ne tuhaf şey!"
